title: California Employment Development Department Penalty for Late State Unemployment Insurance Payment
detailed_summary: Infosys received communication from the Employment Development Department, State of California, for collection of a USD 11,041.03 penalty due to late payment of State Unemployment Insurance for Q4FY25. The company stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: The Employment Development Department, State of California levied a total penalty of USD 11,041.03 on Infosys.
The penalty was levied due to late payment of State Unemployment Insurance for Q4FY25.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.authority_or_counterparty: Employment Development Department, State of California
litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Penalty levied due to late payment of State Unemployment Insurance for Q4FY25.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the monetary amount of the penalty.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the company's stated impact assessment.

search_keywords: Employment Development Department State of California
